flows: Voice AEP creation (AEP builder — Voice type)
key_fields: Caller Identity (Name, Claimed Company, Claimed Role)
Call Window (start time, end time, timezone)
open_questions_flagged: Does call recording require a separate VOIP provider configuration — and if recordings are not available, is an operator notes-only fallback acceptable for all customers?
Risk pipeline integration — are vishing outcomes isolated from risk scoring in v1, same as SMS/WhatsApp red team?
What is the SLA for Dune operator campaign activation after submission (currently described as 'within one business day')?
IDP SCIM timezone data — is per-target local timezone call window enforcement feasible in v1 or deferred?
Two-party consent jurisdiction enforcement — does the platform auto-detect target jurisdictions or does the admin self-certify?
Call recording availability — is recording always on, opt-in per campaign, or determined by VOIP provider config?
confidence_notes: No Figma designs exist yet. PRD is synthesized from confirmed design decisions, the Red Team Campaign Launcher PRD, and the AEP Library PRD. All wizard step-level decisions are confirmed. Open questions remain around call recording, VOIP SLA, risk pipeline isolation, and two-party consent enforcement mechanics.
